productDisplayName: Red Tape Men's Stone Casual Shoe
description: Perfect for those casual days, this nubuck and suede combination high-ankle desert boot is a comfort level every man must incorporate in his wardrobe. Upper Suede used in the forefoot and nubuck in the mid and backfoot for absolute style, comfort and breathability High-ankle for upper foot protection Lace-up system for snug, customised Fit Long leather tongue with a fabric inner lining for a comfortable, abrasion-free wear Leather inner lining of the collar for a comfortable wear Stitch detailing for durability and style Midsole PU midsole for lightweight comfort and impact protection Complete fabric inner lining for maximum breathability Padded fabric footbed for all-day comfort Outsole Durable rubber outsole with a wooden finish on the forefoot and horizontal grooves on the back heel for grip on smooth surfaces Raised heel for ergonomic comfort and style, with a wood finish on the outside shoe careUse a nubuck and suede brush to remove dustDo not store in direct sunlight
